name: terminal-demo
description: Electron demo shell for Terminal Platform

scripts.verify:renderer-static: npm run stage:workspace-sdk && npm run build:renderer && node ./scripts/verify-static-renderer-preview.mjs
scripts.test:offline: npm run check:architecture && npm run stage:workspace-sdk && npm run typecheck:renderer && npm run test:composition && npm run verify:renderer-static
scripts.typecheck: npm run check:architecture && npm run stage:sdk && tsc -p tsconfig.host.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.build:host: node --input-type=module -e "import fs from 'node:fs'; fs.rmSync('dist/host', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist/features', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('dist/shared', { recursive: true, force: true });" && tsc -p tsconfig.host.json && tsc-alias -p tsconfig.host.json --resolve-full-paths --resolve-full-extension .js
scripts.build: npm run stage:sdk && npm run check:architecture && npm run build:host && npm run build:renderer
scripts.test: npm run check:architecture && npm run stage:sdk && npm run build:host && node --test ./tests/**/*.test.mjs
